heading: Cluster Resilience
body:
To improve the resiliency of your cluster, [upgrade your cluster to MongoDB 8.0](upgrade-major-MongoDB-version). MongoDB 8.0
introduces the following performance improvements and new features
related to resilience:

- [Improved memory management](resilient-upgraded-tcmalloc)

- [Operation rejection filters](resilient-operations-rejection-filters)  to reactively mitigate expensive queries

- [Cluster-level timeouts](resilient-default-read-timeout) for proactive protection against expensive read operations

- Better workload isolation with the [moveCollection command](resilient-move-collection)
